title: Shugaba Buhari Ya Kawo Shawara Kan Yaki Da Fararen Hula
description: Shugaba Muhammadu Buhari ya ce za a biya duk wata hanya don tabbatar da zaman lafiya a kasar. An gudanar da taro mai muhimmanci inda aka tattauna kan al'amuran rashin zaman lafiya.

title: Yayyida Ƙungiyar Ƙwallon Ƙafa ta Najeriya Ta Ci Gasar Ƙwallon Ƙafa
description: Ƙungiyar Ƙwallon Ƙafa ta Najeriya ta lashe gasar cin kofin Afirka ta yamma. Wannan nasarar ta zo ne bayan wasanni masu kayatarwa.

title: Shugaban Ƙasar Amurka Ya Bayyana Shawara Kan Yaki Da Shinge
description: Shugaba Joe Biden ya bayyana shirin sa ne a taron manema labarai da aka gudanar. An tattauna kan batutuwa da yawa.

title: Sabon Shiri Na Rage Talauci A Ƙasar Najeriya
description: Gwamnati ta sanar da sabon shiri na rage talauci a fadin ƙasar. An fayyace cikakken bayani kan yadda ake aiwatar da shirin.

title: Masu zafin jini a Ukraine sun ci gaba da yaki
description: Rikicin Ukraine ya ci gaba da yawaitawa yayin da kungiyoyin kasa da kasa ke kokarin sanya zaman lafiya.

title: Wasannin Biki: Matasan Ƙasar Masu Basira
description: Matasan ƙasar sun nuna basira mai ban mamaki a gasar wasannin biki. An samu nasarori da yawa.

title: Sabon Shiri Na Ilimi A Ƙasar Najeriya
description: Gwamnati ta bayyana sabon shiri na inganta ilimi a fadin ƙasar. An zabi manyan hedkwatai.

title: Zaman Lafiya A Ƙasar: Sabon Rahoto
description: Ƙungiyar kasa da kasa ta fitar da sabon rahoto kan zaman lafiya a duniya. An nuna damuwa.

title: Rikicin Siyasa: Sabbin Ci gaba
description: An samu sabbin ci gaba a rikicin siyasa. Manyan shugabanni sun tattauna kan wannan makulo.

title: Fasaha: Sabbin Kayayyaki A Kasuwa
description: Sabbin kayayyaki na fasaha sun fara fitowa a kasuwa. An nuna sha'awar mutane da kayayyakin.

title: Kwallon Kafa: Manchester City Ta Lashe Kofin
description: Manchester City ta lashe kofin gasar cin kofin turai. Wannan shine nasara ta uku a jere.

title: Tattalin Arziki: An Sanar Da Sabon Kudin Kudi
description: An sanar da sabon kudin kudi na shekarar 2026. An bayyana yadda hakan zai shafe tattalin arziki.
